case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS RAMIREZ, CONSUELO

docket_entries.description: SERVICE ON RONALD LEAFTY FILED. LEAFTY NOT NAMED IN CLAIM. COURT DATE OF MAY 4, 2001
